name: 鸣潮 穗穗｜金穗潮音
description: 基于《鸣潮》穗穗官方视觉特征生成的 Codex 主题背景：单人穗穗主视觉、金穗、水纹、音律仪式感与左侧暗色 UI 留白；图标为同主题金穗/水纹 SVG 套件。
author: yanhuuo

source.title: Suisui theme wallpaper generated from official character features
source.process: generated with concrete Suisui reference traits: short platinum bob, gold eyes/red eyeliner, blue-gold feather ornament, folded fan/resonance instrument, black-gold collar, cream dress, aqua sleeve ribbons, dark Codex UI-safe left negative space
